description_long: This object is a compact shotgun with a metallic barrel and receiver, paired with a wooden grip and stock. The barrel is relatively short and cylindrical, with a smooth, unadorned finish and no visible ribbing or venting. The receiver is robust and blocky, featuring a prominent trigger guard and a visible trigger. The grip and stock are made from a single piece of wood, shaped with flat facets and a slightly angular profile, providing a sturdy hold. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses the trigger securely, with no finger grooves or reinforcement visible. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on function over decorative elements.
description: A compact shotgun with a short metallic barrel, blocky receiver, and angular wooden grip and stock. The design is simple and utilitarian, with a rounded trigger guard and no visible ribbing or venting.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the metallic barrel, blocky receiver, and angular wooden grip and stock.
description_view_1: Rear angled view emphasizing the wooden grip and stock, as well as the back of the receiver and the trigger guard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the shotgun's profile, with the barrel, receiver, and grip visible in alignment.
description_view_3: Front angled view focusing on the muzzle end of the barrel, the twin barrel openings, and the top of the receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, barrels of equal length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized, enclosing the trigger with no finger grooves or reinforcement
